summary: IoT Product Manager with experience in technology leadership, enterprise software, automation, and AI platforms.

experience.title: Product Manager — Enterprise Software, Automation & AI Platforms

bullets.text: Led product strategy for AI-powered Software Management Center launched to 100K+ Dell employees (20K MAU), directly supporting a CIO initiative to reduce software titles from 12K to 2K with projected $300–400M in savings. Delivered AI-first self-service platform using open-source LLM with RAG architecture over 365K assets via REST API integrations across multiple internal enterprise systems.
